info.name: AI sass
info.description: Auto-generated from Laravel routes with request attributes (body/query fields). Set {{server}} to your API base URL (e.g. http://aisass.test/api). Run Public > Login to auto-save tokens.

query.description: Filter by status: new | assigned | in_progress | pending_verification | completed | closed | on_hold | cancelled
Filter by priority: low | medium | high | critical
Return all results (default: 1). Set to 0 to paginate.
Results per page (only effective when all=0 or per_page is sent).
